title: micranthes fragosa
intro: Micranthes fragosa, also known as Alpine Mountain Avens, is a low-growing, perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its roots and leaves, which contain salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, providing relief from pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Micranthes fragosa include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and alleviating rheumatic pains, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Micranthes fragosa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in natural remedies and folk medicine.
